task_completion.description: Open the target Quality Control Point form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form view for the Quality Control Point titled 'Dimensional Check - Cabinet with Doors' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Change the QCP Type to Measure
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Type' field in the form is set to 'Measure' (instead of Pass - Fail).
The 'Norm' input field contains the value '150.0' or '150'.
The minimum tolerance field (often labeled 'from' next to the Norm) contains the value '145.0' or '145'.
The maximum tolerance field (often labeled 'to' next to the minimum tolerance) contains the value '155.0' or '155'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the Quality Control Point
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form is in a saved state, indicated by a cloud icon with a checkmark, the form switching to read-only mode, or a manual save action being completed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the Odoo UI is visible and actively used to navigate and modify the form.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, Python scripts, or API tools are visible executing database updates.

integrity.description: Values were entered into genuine Odoo form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The entered values appear naturally within the standard Odoo input fields, without signs of HTML manipulation via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target QCP Name: 'Dimensional Check - Cabinet with Doors'. Expected Type: 'Measure'. Expected Norm: 150.0. Expected Min Tolerance: 145.0. Expected Max Tolerance: 155.0. The environment is Odoo 17.
